text:
There once was a young man named Jack. Jack loved animals. One summer day, he decided to take an interest hunt bird watches. Jack wanted to learn about owls. Night after night, Jack stood guard at owl tower. Owls didn't seem too interested. Eventually, Jack went home sad.

Just then, a friend came over to listen to stories. When Jack finished talking about owls, his friend loved it. The two went bird watching.

That weekend Jack saw an owl Owlkovo. Owlovo didn’t seem scared. Owlovo took flight.

That day, Jack learned Owlovo loves pine cones. After the hunt, Owlovo took flight.

Jack went home happy.

That night owl Owlkovo flew across stars.

That's a story.
